params._bridge: The address of the bridge we are setting the limit too

params._mintingLimit: The updated minting limit we are setting to the bridge

Paused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`.

RoleAdminChanged(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32.details: Emitted when `newAdminRole` is set as ``role``'s admin role, replacing `previousAdminRole` `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` is the starting admin for all roles, despite {RoleAdminChanged} not being emitted signaling this. _Available since v3.1._

RoleGranted(bytes32,address,address).details: Emitted when `account` is granted `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call, an admin role bearer except when using {AccessControl-_setupRole}.

RoleRevoked(bytes32,address,address).details: Emitted when `account` is revoked `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call:   - if using `revokeRole`, it is the admin role bearer   - if using `renounceRole`, it is the role bearer (i.e. `account`)

params.threshold: The number of bridges required to relay the asset.

params.newStrategy: The address of the new yield strategy
params.oldStrategy: The address of the old yield strategy

the bridge we are viewing the limits of

constructor.details: To configure multibridge limits, use the zero address as a bridge in `_bridges` and set the limits accordingly.

params._addresses: An array with four elements, containing the token address, the user that gets DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE and PAUSE_ROLE, the user getting only PAUSE_ROLE,          the fee collector contract, the controller address in other chains for the given chain IDs (if deployed with create3).
params._bridges: The list of bridge adapter addresses that have limits set for minting and burning.
params._burningLimits: The list of burning limits for the bridge adapters. It must correspond to the burn() function of the token, otherwise tokens cannot be burned
params._chainId: The list of chain IDs to set the controller addresses for.
params._duration: The duration it takes for the limits to fully replenish.
params._minBridges: The minimum number of bridges required to relay an asset for multi-bridge transfers. Setting to 0 will disable multi-bridge transfers.
params._mintingLimits: The list of minting limits for the bridge adapters. It must correspond to the mint() function of the token, otherwise tokens cannot be minted
params._multiBridgeAdapters: The addresses of the initial bridge adapters that can be used for multi-bridge transfers, bypassing the limits.
params._selectors: Mint and burn function selectors. An empty bytes4 should be passed.
params._yieldStrategy: The address of the initial yield strategy to use. Setting to address(0) means no strategy.

deployToStrategy(uint256).details: Only callable by YIELD_MANAGER_ROLE. Strategy must be set.

params.transferId: The unique identifier of the transfer.

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

params._bridge: the bridge we are viewing the limits of
the bridge we are viewing the limits of

pause().details: Only the owner can call this function.

pauseTransfersToChain(uint256,bool).details: Only the owner can call this function.

params._chainId: The chain ID to pause or unpause transfers to.
params._pause: True to pause transfers, false to unpause.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

receiveMessage(bytes,uint256,address).details: Can be called by an adapter contract only

params.originSender: The address of the origin sender. (controller in origin chain)
params.receivedMsg: The received message data in bytes.

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `account`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

params.amount: The amount of ETH to rescue.
params.to: The address to send the rescued ETH to.

params.amount: The amount of tokens to rescue.
params.to: The address to send the rescued tokens to.
params.token: The address of the token to rescue.

params.adapter: The address of the bridge adapter.
params.options: Additional params to be used by the adapter.
params.transferId: The unique identifier of the transfer.

resendTransfer(bytes32,address[],uint256.details: msg.value should contain the total bridge adapter fees

params.adapters: The addresses of the bridge adapters.
params.fees: The fees to be paid to the bridge adapters.
params.options: Additional params to be used by the adapter.
params.transferId: The unique identifier of the transfer.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

params.recipient: The address of the recipient. Could be the same as msg.sender.
params.unwrap: Applicable only to XERC20 transfers. Used to unwrap the native asset using the lockbox on destination, if enabled on the destination.

Controller_AdapterNotSupported().notice: Error thrown when a multibridge adapter specified is not whitelisted

Controller_Chain_Not_Supported().notice: Error thrown when an asset controller is not deployed/supported on the other chain

Controller_DuplicateAdapter().notice: Error thrown when the adapter is a duplicate in the adapters array

Controller_EtherTransferFailed().notice: Error thrown when the ether transfer fails

Controller_FeesSumMismatch().notice: Error thrown when the msg.value and the sum of fees[] don't match

Controller_InsufficientLiquidity().notice: Error thrown when there is insufficient liquidity to fulfill a mint message

Controller_InvalidStrategy().notice: Error thrown when an invalid yield strategy contract is set

Controller_Invalid_Params().notice: Error thrown when invalid parameters are provided.

Controller_LimitsTooHigh().notice: Error thrown when new limits are too high.

Controller_MultiBridgeTransfersDisabled(.notice: Error thrown when multi-bridge transfers are disabled

Controller_NotEnoughTokensInPool().notice: Error thrown when there are not enough tokens in the pool

Controller_NotHighEnoughLimits().notice: Reverts when a user with too low of a limit tries to call mint/burn

Controller_ThresholdNotMet().notice: Error thrown when the threshold is not met for execution

Controller_TokenBurnFailed().notice: Error thrown when the burn function call on the token fails

Controller_TokenMintFailed().notice: Error thrown when the mint function call on the token fails

Controller_TransferFailed().notice: Error thrown when a transfer fails

Controller_TransferNotExecutable().notice: Error thrown when a transfer is not executable

Controller_TransferResentByAadapter().notice: Error thrown when an adapter resends a transfer that has already been delivered

Controller_TransfersPausedToDestination(.notice: Error thrown when transfers to the destination chain are paused

Controller_UnknownTransfer().notice: Error thrown when the transferId is not recognized

Controller_UnwrappingNotSupported().notice: Error thrown when XERC20 token unwrapping is not supported

Controller_ZeroAddress().notice: Error thrown when a zero address is encountered

Controller_ZeroAmount().notice: Error thrown when the amount passed is zero

AllowTokenUnwrappingSet(bool).notice: Event emitted when the token unwrapping setting is changed.

BridgeLimitsSet(uint256,uint256,address).notice: Emits when a limit is set

ControllerForChainSet(address,uint256).notice: Event emitted when the controller address for a chain is set.

FundsDeployedToStrategy(uint256).notice: Event emitted when funds are deployed to the yield strategy

FundsWithdrawnFromStrategy(uint256).notice: Event emitted when funds are withdrawn from the yield strategy

LiquidityAdded(uint256).notice: Event emitted when liquidity is added

LiquidityRemoved(uint256).notice: Event emitted when liquidity is removed

MinBridgesSet(uint256).notice: Event emitted when the minimum number of bridges required to relay an asset for multi-bridge transfers is set.

MultiBridgeAdapterSet(address,bool).notice: Event emitted when bridge adapters that can be used for multi-bridge transfers, bypassing the limits have been set

TransferCreated(bytes32,uint256,uint256,.notice: Event emitted when an asset mint message is sent to another chain.

TransferExecutable(bytes32).notice: Event emitted when a transfer can now be executed.

TransferExecuted(bytes32).notice: Event emitted when an asset is minted on the current chain.

TransferReceived(bytes32,uint256,address.notice: Event emitted when an asset is received from another chain.

TransferRelayed(bytes32,address).notice: Event emitted when an asset mint message is sent to another chain via a bridgeAdapter.

TransferResent(bytes32).notice: Event emitted when a transfer is resent.

TransfersPausedToChain(uint256,bool).notice: Event emitted when transfers to a specific chain are paused or unpaused.

YieldStrategySet(address,address).notice: Event emitted when the yield strategy is set

BURN_SELECTOR().notice: The function selector for the burn function on the token.

BURN_SELECTOR_SINGLE().notice: The function selector for the burn(uint256) function on the token.

MINT_SELECTOR().notice: The function selector for the mint function on the token.

PAUSE_ROLE().notice: The role that allows an address to pause the contract

YIELD_MANAGER_ROLE().notice: Role identifier for the account that can manage yield strategies.

bridges(address).notice: Maps bridge address to bridge configurations

burningCurrentLimitOf(address).notice: Returns the current limit of a bridge

burningMaxLimitOf(address).notice: Returns the max limit of a bridge

calculateTransferId(uint256).notice: Calculates the transfer ID based on the provided parameters.

constructor.notice: Initializes the contract with the given parameters.

deployToStrategy(uint256).notice: Deposits funds to the yield strategy

duration().notice: The duration it takes for the limits to fully replenish

execute(bytes32).notice: Executes a received multibridge transfer. Anyone can execute a transfer

getControllerForChain(uint256).notice: Returns the controller address for a given chain ID.

getTotalValueLocked().notice: Returns the total value locked including strategy deposits

hasYieldStrategy().notice: Returns whether a yield strategy is active

mintingCurrentLimitOf(address).notice: Returns the current limit of a bridge

mintingMaxLimitOf(address).notice: Returns the max limit of a bridge

nonce().notice: Nonce used in transferId calculation, increments after each calculation.

pauseTransfersToChain(uint256,bool).notice: Pauses or unpauses the initiation of new transfers to a specific chain.

rescueETH(address,uint256).notice: Allows the admin to rescue ETH stuck in the contract.

rescueTokens(address,address,uint256).notice: Allows the admin to rescue tokens stuck in the contract.

resendTransfer(bytes32,address,bytes).notice: Resends a single-bridge transfer message to another chain via a bridgeAdapterMsg.sender will receive any refunds from excess fees paid by the bridge, if the bridge supports it.

resendTransfer(bytes32,address[],uint256.notice: Resends a multi-bridge transfer message to another chain via one or more multibridge whitelested bridge Adapters

setControllerForChain(uint256[],address[.notice: Sets the controller addresses for the given chain IDs.

setLimits(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Updates the limits of any bridge

setMinBridges(uint256).notice: Sets the minimum number of bridges required to relay an asset for multi-bridge transfers.

setMultiBridgeAdapters(address[],bool[]).notice: Adds a bridge adapter to the whitelist for multibridge transfers.

setTokenUnwrapping(bool).notice: Overrides the setTokenUnwrapping function to revert, as unwrapping is not supported in this implementation.

setYieldStrategy(address).notice: Sets or updates the yield strategy

transferTo(address,uint256,bool,uint256,.notice: Sends a message to another chain via a bridgeAdapter to mint the asset.

Sends a message to another chain via multiple bridgeAdapter to mint the asset, bypassing the individual bridge limits.This function uses instead higher limits, since execution goes through a minimum number of bridges.Msg.sender will receive any refunds from excess fees paid by the bridge, if the bridge supports it.

withdraw(address).notice: Withdraws the contract balance to the recipient address.

withdrawFromStrategy(uint256).notice: Manually withdraw funds from the yield strategy

withdrawMaxFromStrategy().notice: Manually withdraw the maximum principal from the yield strategy

yieldStrategy().notice: The active yield strategy (address(0) means no strategy)

userdoc.notice: An implementation of the AssetController but instead of burning/minting tokens, it locks and releases ERC20s.
